patch_analysis: [FileChange(file_path='server/src/main/java/org/elasticsearch/common/util/BigArrays.java', change_type='MODIFIED', added_lines=['newSize = Math.min(ArrayUtil.oversize((int) minTargetSize, bytesPerElement), pageSize);', 'final long pages = (minTargetSize + pageSize - 1) / pageSize; // ceil(minTargetSize/pageSize)', 'newSize = pages * pageSize;'], removed_lines=['newSize = ArrayUtil.oversize((int)minTargetSize, bytesPerElement);', 'newSize = minTargetSize + (minTargetSize >>> 3);', '}', '', 'if (newSize > pageSize) {', '// round to a multiple of pageSize', 'newSize = newSize - (newSize % pageSize) + pageSize;', 'assert newSize % pageSize == 0;'], is_test_file=False, previous_file_path=None)]
